LAW AND MOTION 301, CROSS DEFENDANT ALCAL SPECIALTY CONTRACTING, INC.'S, A NEVADA CORPORATION, APPLICATION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 877 AND 877.6. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR GOOD-FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. THIS DETERMINATION BARS "ANY OTHER JOINT TORTFEASOR OR CO-OBLIGOR FROM ANY FURTHER CLAIMS AGAINST THE SETTLING TORTFEASOR OR CO-OBLIGOR FOR EQUITABLE COMPARATIVE CONTRIBUTION, OR PARTIAL OR COMPARATIVE INDEMNITY, BASED ON COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE OR COMPARATIVE FAULT." (CODE CIV. PROC., SEC. 877.6, SUBD. (C).) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application And Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 877 And 877.6
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT ALCAL SPECIALTY CONTRACTING, INC.'s, A NEVADA CORPORATION, Application For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 877 And 877.6.

The unopposed motion for good-faith settlement determination is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. This determination bars "any other joint tortfeasor or co-obligor from any further claims against the settling tortfeasor or co-obligor for equitable comparative contribution, or partial or comparative indemnity, based on comparative negligence or comparative fault." (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 877.6, subd. (c).)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
